title: phlomis damascena
intro: Phlomis damascena, also known as Lamiacae, is a flowering plant native to the Middle East and Mediterranean regions. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Phlomis damascena include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and alleviating respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Phlomis damascena include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally to reap its medicinal benefits.
